name: Travelling the Dragon Village .
description:
You find yourself floating in a field of blackness, filled with tiny tendril
of silvery light and insubstantial shining motes of dust.  The weightlessness
of this environment is extremely disorienting. Nearby you see a large silvery
strand of light.
   Most exits lead off into the Dragon Village field.

exits.description: The Dragon Village field leads off into infinity.
The Dragon Village field leads off into infinity.
You see a tangible strand of silvery light.
The Dragon Village field leads off into infinity.
The Dragon Village field leads off into infinity.
The Dragon Village field leads off into infinity.
